features: Creative Portable Art Station тАУ A soft, padded lap tray packed with colouring fun. Includes 40-page activity pad, 6 pens, and stickers тАУ designed for travel, car rides, and home play.
Everything in One Case тАУ Handy zip-up storage keeps pens and pad neat and tidy, ideal for taking on planes, trains, or sleepovers.

description: Let your little artist colour, learn and play тАУ anytime, anywhere тАУ with the abeec Colouring & Activity Lap Case (Pink). Designed for children aged 3тАУ8, this adorable cake-themed lap tray includes a 40-page colouring & activity pad, 6 bright felt tip pens, and a reusable sticker sheet filled with unicorns, rainbows, hearts, and sweet treats. From dot-to-dots and mazes to colouring scenes and problem-solving games, this kit is perfect for boosting creativity, fine motor skills and screen-free concentration. The padded lap case keeps everything together with a secure zip, making it the ideal activity set for road trips, holiday flights, or relaxing at home. Whether itтАЩs a rainy-day activity or a birthday gift, this complete art and learning set supports independence and imagination тАФ perfect for creative explorers on the move.
